M-080.NAME: visible-brand-logo-integration
M-080.path: frontend/public frontend-admin/public frontend/src/components frontend-admin/src/components backend/app/email/templates.py docs/plans/Phase-63.xml scripts/phase63-visible-logo-integration-smoke.mjs
M-080.owns: Visible KrotPN logo usage across public site, auth, user cabinet, admin panel, PWA/favicons, and email templates.
M-080.purpose: Use prepared logo assets consistently where the premium redesign needs visible brand identity.

exports.component-brand-mark: User and admin reusable brand mark placement.
exports.rule-logo-sizing: Responsive logo sizing and asset selection for header, auth, PWA, email, and admin contexts.

constraints.constraint-1: Do not overwrite BIMI semantics or claim mailbox sender-avatar control.
constraints.constraint-2: Use appropriately sized assets and avoid large logo files on first paint.
constraints.constraint-3: Logo placement must not crowd mobile navigation, forms, cards, or admin tables.

acceptance-metrics.metric-1: User and admin builds include visible logo usage without layout overlap.
acceptance-metrics.metric-2: Logo smoke verifies source dimensions, copied assets, HTML/PWA references, and email template references.
acceptance-metrics.metric-3: Screenshot review confirms premium brand presence on public/auth/user/admin surfaces.

M-080.hotspot: H-067: Visible logo integration must use prepared brand assets without bloating pages or conflicting with BIMI/email-avatar boundaries.
